title: lobelia trialata var. umbrosa
intro: Lobelia trialata var. umbrosa, also known as woodland lobelia, is a variety of the lobelia plant species that belongs to the Campanulaceae family. This plant is prized for its medicinal properties, particularly its expectorant and antispasmodic effects, which help to relieve respiratory issues such as bronchitis, asthma, and coughs. The health benefits of woodland lobelia include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory function, and alleviate symptoms of anxiety and insomnia. Woodland lobelia can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are used to treat various health conditions, although its use should be done under the guidance of a healthcare professional.
